name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla Group Lateral Movement
notes:
This Building Block detects automated lateral movement by Turla group.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Markus Neis
SIGMA Title: Turla Group Lateral Movement 
SIGMA Description: Detects automated lateral movement by Turla group


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla Group Lateral Movement on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE 'net use \\\%%domaincontroller%%\c$ "p@ssw0rd" %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'dir c:\%.doc% /s' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'dir %%temp%%\%.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla Group Lateral Movement on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE 'net use \\\%%domaincontroller%%\c$ "p@ssw0rd" %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'dir c:\%.doc% /s' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'dir %%temp%%\%.exe' AQL filter query
